post_install.subtitle: ONCard 1.4.8 keeps the MCQ update moving and fixes Nomic embedding model detection for local Ollama installs.
post_install.text1: MCQ remains the main focus. Studying is more interactive, easier to start, and easier to understand because AI can break down what you got right and wrong.
post_install.summary_text: This patch also recognizes nomic-embed-text-v2-moe:latest as an installed Nomic embedding model, so NNA setup should stop asking for a model you already have.
post_install.text2:
MCQ study keeps the flow simple: choose an answer, get feedback, and let AI explain what went right or wrong. The goal is to make each session feel easier, more interactive, and more useful for understanding the subject you want to learn.

Still in beta. Marks will be either 10 or 0. I am working on a better grading system for MCQs.

whats_new.title: Study With MCQs
whats_new.description: ONCard 1.4.8 is a patch for the MCQ release and Nomic embedding model detection.
points: Study with MCQs when you want quick, focused practice.
AI helps break down what you did right and wrong so you can understand the subject better.
NNA now recognizes nomic-embed-text-v2-moe:latest when checking local Ollama model availability.
FTC and image processing pipeline improvements from the MCQ update remain included.
